name: pos-grocery
description: Grocery POS system with React frontend and Express backend.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix front-end run lint && npm --prefix back-end run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix front-end run typecheck && npm --prefix back-end run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix front-end test && npm --prefix back-end test
scripts.build: npm --prefix front-end run build && npm --prefix back-end run build
